nodes.name: HTTP — Get Tenant by Phone ID

parameters.url: =https://flowbot-steel.vercel.app/api/v1/products?tenant_id={{ $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.tenantId }}&limit=50&sort=relevance{{ $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.query ? '&q=' + encodeURIComponent($('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.query) : '' }}{{ $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.minPrice != null ? '&min_price=' + $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.minPrice : '' }}{{ $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.maxPrice != null ? '&max_price=' + $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.maxPrice : '' }}{{ $('Code — Detect Language + Route').first().json.search.inStockOnly ? '&in_stock=true' : '' }}

parameters.content:
## Integration API — manual health check
Run this to verify the FlowBot API is reachable.

- **ping** → `POST /api/v1/n8n/webhook` `{action:'ping'}`
- **chatbot-settings** → `GET /api/v1/chatbot-settings`

Replace `tenant_abc123` with a real tenant id.
These do NOT run in the live message flow.
